data.content: Approved implementation. Active view now shows Agent/Model/Version columns from latest handoff capsule metadata with running terminal session data overriding when available. Wiring confirmed through beats page -> beat table -> beat columns. Validation: bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed (121 files, 1945 tests). Repository-level lint/build currently fail due existing unrelated issues in workspace (extensive pre-existing lint errors and Next prerender key warning/typeerror), not introduced by this change.
